title: Innovative Media Education: NIMCJ's Digital Leap
description: The National Institute of Mass Communication and Journalism (NIMCJ) in Ahmedabad has revamped its media education curriculum to include Artificial Intelligence and digital media. This strategic shift aligns with the growing need for technological innovation in India's media sector, enhancing students' competitive edge in the job market.

title: AI boom helps erase California’s multibillion-dollar budget deficit
description: Gov. Gavin Newsom on Thursday released an updated budget plan that shows California has erased its projected deficit for the next two years, thanks to billions of dollars in additional tax revenue tied to Silicon Valley’s artificial intelligence boom.
